decisions.title: Use of PM2 for process orchestration
decisions.context: Need to keep the Python backend and Vite frontend running simultaneously 24/7 on a Windows environment for trade monitoring.
decisions.decision: Use PM2 via ecosystem.config.js to manage both the Uvicorn FastAPI server and the `npm run dev` Vite process.

decisions.title: Frontend Polling instead of WebSockets
decisions.context: We need to reflect the Matador Setup signal changes in near real-time.
decisions.decision: The React Dashboard uses a `setInterval` loop polling `/api/v2/regime` every 2.5 seconds to handle reconnections and reduce state complexities over WebSocket.

decisions.title: Lookback-only NWE (Nadaraya-Watson Envelope)
decisions.context: Trading algorithms using NWE are susceptible to lookahead bias if the filter uses future data points.
decisions.decision: Implement a strictly causal NWE algorithm that filters using only historical points up to time T.
